Package de.uka.ilkd.key.prover.impl

Class DefaultGoalChooser

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.prover.impl.DefaultGoalChooser
All Implemented Interfaces:
GoalChooser
Direct Known Subclasses:
DepthFirstGoalChooser
public class DefaultGoalChooser extends Object implements GoalChooser
Helper class for managing a list of goals on which rules are applied. The class provides methods for removing a goal, and for updating the internal data structures after a rule has been applied.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    findMinimalSubtree(Node p_startNode)
    Search for a minimal subtree of the proof tree which is not closable (constraints of its goals are inconsistent) starting at p_startNode PRECONDITION: all goals have satisfiable constraints
    protected boolean
    findMinimalSubtreeBelow(Node p_startNode)
    Search for a minimal subtree of the proof tree which is not closable (constraints of its goals are inconsistent) below p_startNode PRECONDITION: * !isSatisfiableSubtree ( p_startNode ) * all goals have satisfiable constraints
    Goal
    getNextGoal()
     
    void
    init(Proof p_proof, ImmutableList<Goal> p_goals)

    isSatisfiableSubtree(Node p_root)

    removeClosedGoals()

    rotateList(ImmutableList<Goal> p_list)
     
    protected void
    setupGoals(ImmutableList<Goal> p_goals)

    The given node has become an internal node of the proof tree, and the children of the node are the given goals

    • proof

      protected ImmutableList<Goal> nextGoals
      part of goalList that should be worked on next

    • allGoalsSatisfiable

      protected boolean allGoalsSatisfiable
      true iff all goals have satisfiable constraints

    • selectedList

      protected ImmutableList<Goal> selectedList
      Subset of the goals to which currently taclets are applied. First this is the list of goals with unsatisfiable constraints, later this is a subset of the goals having inconsistent constraints

    • currentSubtreeRoot

      protected Node currentSubtreeRoot

    • nextGoalCounter

      protected int nextGoalCounter

      public void removeGoal(Goal p_goal)

    • findMinimalSubtreeBelow

      protected boolean findMinimalSubtreeBelow(Node p_startNode)
      Search for a minimal subtree of the proof tree which is not closable (constraints of its goals are inconsistent) below p_startNode PRECONDITION: * !isSatisfiableSubtree ( p_startNode ) * all goals have satisfiable constraints
      Returns:
      true iff a non-empty subtree was found

    • findMinimalSubtree

      protected void findMinimalSubtree(Node p_startNode)
      Search for a minimal subtree of the proof tree which is not closable (constraints of its goals are inconsistent) starting at p_startNode PRECONDITION: all goals have satisfiable constraints
